## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI adoption strategies and internal productivity improvements at Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase is shifting focus to AI-powered software that does work for customers](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Ray seeks advice on change management and tooling for company-wide AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Marcel shares insights from successful AI initiatives at other companies (e.g. G-gram)](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Emphasis on cultural shift, enabling curiosity, and showcasing early wins to drive adoption](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

## Topics

### Homebase's AI Strategy

  - [Shifting from software that helps do work to software that does work for customers](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Launched first small-scale AI product, now expanding to all product teams](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Focused on three areas: product features, software development, and internal productivity](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Goal: close gap with potential future AI-native competitors](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Challenges in AI Adoption

  - [Difficulty in mandating AI use across teams](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Need for cultural shift and reducing activation energy for AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Balancing central resources/training with team-level ownership of AI initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Overcoming "deer in headlights" effect and cold start problem for employees](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### Lessons from Successful AI Initiatives

  - [G-gram example: 100+ automations created, employees building their own tools](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Importance of showcasing results (e.g., organic traffic growth) to inspire adoption](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Value of having champions (e.g., CTO, RevOps) and curious early adopters](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [CEO mandate and consistent messaging about AI importance](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### AI Implementation Approaches

  - [Focus on changing mindsets rather than immediate ROI](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Start with highly motivated individuals/teams, then expand](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Use hackathons and workshops to generate excitement](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Encourage public sharing of AI wins to inspire others](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### Tools and Platforms

  - [Caution against over-reliance on SaaS AI tools that may become outdated quickly](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Preference for flexible, customizable solutions over black-box offerings](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Consideration for specialized tools in areas like knowledge retrieval (e.g., Glean)](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ray to review potential for Homebase team members to join upcoming AI cohort](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Explore possibility of working with Marcel's team on a 3-month sprint with 1-2 groups](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Plan AI-focused hackathon to energize Homebase employees](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Ray to discuss findings and next steps with John (likely CEO or another executive)](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Consider Marcel's offer for additional support, including CTO involvement](https://fathom.video/share/KpLJ3mNZFruYBhwMAb1KPw2bbydiBc6X?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
